linting.notes: No golangci-lint config file present, uses default linters. Makefile provides `make lint` target that runs golangci-lint, `make vet` for go vet, and `make fmt-check` for format checking.

testing.test_directory: distributed across packages: internal/catalog, internal/config, internal/enrichment, internal/huggingface, internal/metadata, internal/registry, pkg/types, pkg/utils
testing.fixtures_location: tests use t.TempDir() for temporary directories, sample test data embedded in test files
testing.mock_patterns: Table-driven tests with inline test cases, uses standard Go testing with subtests (t.Run)
testing.notes: 16 test files found. Tests include unit tests for catalog generation, config management, enrichment, HuggingFace integration, metadata parsing, registry services, types, and utilities. Some tests attempt network calls (HuggingFace API, container registries) which may fail without external access but tests still pass. No integration tests requiring infrastructure.

ci.notes: Only one workflow runs actual tests: build-and-push-static-model-catalog-data.yml triggers on pull_request to main for data/**, Dockerfile, and workflow file changes. The workflow runs 'make test' which executes 'go test -v ./...'. Other workflows are for branch syncing only. No explicit lint check in CI, but Makefile provides comprehensive check targets.

build.install_command: go mod download && go mod tidy
build.notes: Two binaries: model-extractor (main) and metadata-report. Makefile provides targets: build, build-report, build-linux (cross-compile), clean. Also has 'make ci' target that runs: deps check test build. Go 1.24 required, toolchain go1.25.7.

conventions.test_naming: Test* functions, table-driven tests with t.Run subtests
conventions.import_style: Standard Go import grouping: stdlib, external, internal
conventions.notes: Project follows standard Go conventions. Uses pointer types for optional fields in metadata structs. Comprehensive error handling with descriptive messages. Concurrent processing with configurable limits.

lint_commands.notes: Passed with no issues. golangci-lint must be installed first: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest

test_commands.notes: All tests passed. 8 packages tested: internal/catalog, internal/config, internal/enrichment, internal/huggingface, internal/metadata, internal/registry, pkg/types, pkg/utils. Tests took ~55 seconds total. Some tests attempt network calls but handle failures gracefully.
Not validated but should work - runs tests with race detection and coverage

container_recipe.notes: Container validation successful. No external dependencies or infrastructure required for basic test execution. Some tests attempt HuggingFace API calls and container registry access but handle failures. The golang:1.25 image includes all necessary Go tools. golangci-lint installed to /go/bin/golangci-lint in the container.
